economic_notes: Band has investments in Stuwix Resources Ltd. (12.5%), Stuwix Resources Joint Venture (12.5%), Esh-Kn-Am Joint Venture (25%), and 9110 Investments Ltd. (25%) accounted for under modified equity method. Consolidated entities include Coldwater Development Inc., Coldwater Housing Management, and Coldwater Projects.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified for two reasons: (1) Social Housing tangible capital assets are amortized at a rate equivalent to annual principal reduction of related long-term debt as required by CMHC, which is not in accordance with Canadian public sector accounting standards; (2) Auditors were unable to obtain audited financial statements for business entities (Stuwix Resources Ltd., Stuwix Resources Joint Venture, Esh-Kn-Am Joint Venture, 9110 Investments Ltd.) and could not determine if adjustments to investments in business entities are appropriate. Phase 5 completion item of $540,602 appears in statement of change in net financial assets. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNHA + Province of BC + CMHC + FNESC = 7550415+146767+14426+140450+396354 = 8248412; adding Gaming Revenue as quasi-government: if excluded OSR includes gaming, rental, interest, Nlaka'pamux Legacy Trust, other revenue.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
